title: Table element not respecting pagination settings
symptom: The table element displays more rows than the specified max returned items, ignoring pagination settings. The pagination widget does not function as expected.
applies_when: Pagination is set up with a data source
not_this_if: Pagination works correctly with other data sources
root_cause: The issue arises when the pagination is incorrectly bound to the data source. Instead of binding to the collection name directly, it may be mistakenly bound to a sub-property like 'data', which causes the pagination to malfunction.
fix_steps: Open the settings for the table element
Ensure the pagination is bound to the collection name directly
agent_instruction: Bind the pagination to the collection name directly in the table element settings.
